Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Devices]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Zenith Starship is one of the Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Zenith Devices can find individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Zenith Devices are designed with utility in mind rather than comfort.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — All Zenith Devices operate according to highly specific rules.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Zenith Devices are superior to Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — The original Zenith Devices were created by human Technicians.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — The Zenith Devices are considered the greatest Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The crew is searching for Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 20''' — Some Aether Technicians worked on the Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — Zenith Devices can activate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Zenith Devices are powerful entities that use a crew system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — There are seven Zenith Devices.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Zenith Devices are described as priceless even when dormant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Zenith Devices are fundamentally different from modern Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Zenith Devices were examined by the narrator's father and his team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — It is not the role of Zenith Devices to prevent people from acting like heroes.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Benri expresses distrust toward Zenith Devices due to his past experiences.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Solstice funded a massive hunt for the Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Zenith Devices have adaptive functions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Zenith Devices include entities designed for combat and exploration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — A pair of Zenith Devices were used by enemies to ambush Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Zenith Devices originally awakened as seven competitors whose might ended the Zenith Era.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Zenith Devices were made to make galactic civilization flourish.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Solstice possesses two Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — The Voice of Solstice does not need to reveal all secrets to the Zenith Devices.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
